title: Wet Chemistry RNA Isolation Method for Mature Cassava Leaf Tissue
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"46njf","text":"RNA extraction protocol for cassava for RNA of sufficient quality and quantity to perform RT-PCR gene expression studies.  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4ebvu","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cpnvr","text":"*Low recovery was achieved using Qiagen RNeasy kit. Typical recoveries using the mini protocol outlined here yielded 500-1300 ng/ul RNA from ~ 75 mg leaf tissue.*","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"88q3j","text":"This protocol uses chemical fume hoods and centrifuges. Understand  how to safely and appropriately use them before performing the protocol.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":19,"length":19},{"key":1,"offset":43,"length":11}],"data":[]},{"key":"17p3u","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5cbgr","text":"Perform all steps within a fume hood and collect tips and tubes in the hazardous material collection bins. β-mercaptoethanol (β-ME) included in the extraction buffer is toxic, harmful to the environment and corrosive.  Collect hazardous waste and submit to UIUC DRS following proper protocol.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":247,"length":18}],"data":[]},{"key":"otur","text":"\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"esl02","text":"Some of the chemicals used in this protocol pose serious health risks.  Please read all manufacturer safety data sheets before handling.  UIUC personnel performing this protocol should be current on \"Laboratory Safety\", \"Chemical Safety- An Introduction\", and \"Chemical Spills\" Division of Research Safety training modules before performing this protocol.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":3,"offset":199,"length":19},{"key":4,"offset":221,"length":32},{"key":5,"offset":261,"length":15},{"key":6,"offset":278,"length":27}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B805A333ECC111ECBB520A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://drs.illinois.edu/Page/SafetyLibrary/ChemicalFumeHoods"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B805A3FCECC111ECBB520A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.osha.gov/sites/default/files/publications/OSHAquickfacts-lab-safety-centrifuges.pdf"}},"2":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"F3FE3810ECC111EC9A4D4F4255CEF5EB","url":"https://unillinois.chemicalsafety.com/unillinois/"}},"3":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B805A47BECC111ECBB520A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://ovcrportal.research.illinois.edu/Training/Overview.aspx?TrainingId=67"}},"4":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B805A4E9ECC111ECBB520A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://ovcrportal.research.illinois.edu/Training/Overview.aspx?TrainingId=222"}},"5":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B805A554ECC111ECBB520A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://ovcrportal.research.illinois.edu/Training/Overview.aspx?TrainingId=299"}},"6":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B805A5B4ECC111ECBB520A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://drs.illinois.edu"}}}}
